info.name: Prophetic Pathway API
info.description:
Full frontend-friendly Postman collection for the Prophetic Pathway backend.

How to use:
1. Set `baseUrl` to your running backend, usually `http://localhost:5000`.
2. Run an auth request. Login and OTP verification save `accessToken` and `refreshToken` automatically.
3. Replace placeholder IDs such as `{{advisorId}}`, `{{sessionId}}`, and `{{planId}}` from previous API responses.
4. Requests that upload files use form-data and leave file fields empty for you to choose in Postman.

Protected requests inherit Bearer auth from the collection: `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}`.

Mobile auth flow (matches Figma):
  Signup → Verify Signup OTP (returns tokens) → Onboarding - Submit Preferences (8-step questionnaire) → List Public Plans → Subscribe To Plan (by tier).
Forgot-password flow:
  Forgot Password - Send OTP → Verify Reset OTP (returns `resetToken`) → Reset Password.

item.name: 00 - System
item.description: Health and root API checks. These are public.

item.name: 01 - Auth
item.description: Signup, OTP, login, token refresh, password management, and current user.

item.name: 02 - Public Advisors
item.description: Public browse/search endpoints used by frontend discovery screens.

item.name: 03 - User
item.description: Authenticated user profile, preferences, FCM token, deactivation, and favorites.

request.description: Public — returns the 8-step questionnaire shown after OTP verification. Use this so the UI stays in sync with the backend's allowed option lists.
Returns the current user's saved questionnaire answers and `onboardingCompleted` flag.
Accepts partial submissions — call once per step or once at the end. `onboardingCompleted` flips to true only when every step has a value.

body.raw:
{
  "seekingHelpWith": ["Spiritual growth"],
  "guidanceType": "Dream interpretation",
  "connectionMethods": ["Video Call"],
  "atmosphere": "Warm & encouraging",
  "guidanceFrequency": "Weekly",
  "tailoredAreas": ["Marriage"],
  "guideQualityPriority": "Fast responses",
  "usedPlatformBefore": true
}

item.name: 04 - Advisor Self Service
item.description: Advisor-only profile, application, availability, dashboard, and promotion operations.

item.name: 05 - Sessions
item.description: Authenticated booking, LiveKit, lifecycle, billing heartbeat, cancellation, reschedule, tips, and notes.

item.name: 06 - Wallet & Payments
item.description: Wallet balance, transactions, Stripe checkout redirect success/cancel, advisor earnings, and withdrawals.

item.name: 07 - Subscriptions
item.description: Public plan listing, authenticated subscribe/cancel, and Stripe redirect routes.

request.description: Public — returns the three tiers shown on the 'Choose Your Path Forward' screen (Instant Access, Clarity Access, Priority Access). Captures the `planTier` plan's _id into {{planId}}.

Pick a plan from the 'Choose Your Path Forward' screen. Body accepts either `tier` (instant | clarity | priority) or `planId`. Free `instant` tier activates immediately; paid tiers return a Stripe `checkoutUrl`.
Same endpoint as 'by tier' — kept here for the case where the frontend already has a `planId` cached from the plans list.

item.name: 08 - Disputes
item.description: Authenticated user dispute flow. Creation supports up to five document uploads.

formdata.description: Optional document file. Add more rows with key documents for multiple files.

item.name: 09 - Complaints & Safety
item.description: Authenticated complaint and safety reporting flows with optional documents.

item.name: 10 - Reviews
item.description: Public review lists and authenticated session review submission.

item.name: 11 - CMS
item.description: Public CMS reads plus admin CMS, FAQ, page, and blog management.

formdata.value: How to Prepare for a Session

item.name: 12 - Notifications
item.description: Authenticated notification inbox plus admin broadcast.

item.name: 13 - Chats
item.description: Authenticated chat discovery, message listing/sending, read receipts, and admin support chat.

formdata.description: Optional attachment. Add more rows with key attachments for multiple files.

item.name: 15 - Admin
item.description: Admin and sub-admin operations. Use Login - Admin first, or set `accessToken` to an admin/sub-admin token.
